references.borrowed: Browser specs persist ARIA snapshots for audit, break-glass, assurance pack, and redaction surfaces.
references.rejected: ARIA snapshots are supporting evidence only; domain fixtures remain the source of algorithm truth.

references.borrowed: The Playwright helper records local traces with screenshots and DOM snapshots for each task 466 browser run.
references.rejected: Trace content is not used as a source proof hash and remains synthetic-only local evidence.

references.borrowed: The suite captures full-page screenshots for exact, stale, blocked, denied, redaction-drift, and reduced-motion states.
references.rejected: Screenshots do not replace machine-readable evidence or fail-closed assertions.

references.borrowed: The helper records failed request events and fails the suite on unexpected network failures.
references.rejected: No live external network mocking was introduced; task 466 uses local deterministic fixtures.

references.borrowed: Keyboard, focus, status text, reduced-motion, and accessible-name coverage are aligned with testable WCAG 2.2 expectations.
references.rejected: WCAG evidence is not treated as sufficient for Phase 9 graph, audit, or export truth.

references.borrowed: ARIA snapshots check that common widgets and landmarks keep meaningful accessible names and keyboard support.
references.rejected: No custom ARIA widget pattern was added for this testing-only task.

references.borrowed: DTAC areas informed pack coverage for clinical safety, data protection, technical security, interoperability, usability, and accessibility evidence.
references.rejected: The suite does not claim a live DTAC assessment; it validates the local deterministic pack contract.

references.borrowed: DSPT references informed current operational evidence-pack coverage and redacted evidence handling.
references.rejected: No DSPT submission or external toolkit integration is performed by task 466.

references.borrowed: DCB0129 manufacturer clinical-risk evidence coverage is represented in framework mapping and pack generation tests.
references.rejected: No manufacturer safety case is generated; only the pack family and failure states are tested.

references.borrowed: DCB0160 deployment/use evidence coverage is represented in framework mapping and pack export checks.
references.rejected: No deployment safety case or local clinical signoff is created by task 466.

references.borrowed: CAF essential-service resilience framing informed stale, blocked, denied, and recovery-only export postures.
references.rejected: The suite does not perform a CAF assessment; it validates evidence pack and fail-closed behavior.

references.borrowed: Error-summary guidance informed fail-closed visible state checks for denied and blocked export postures.
references.rejected: No GOV.UK component dependency was introduced.

references.borrowed: Warning-text guidance informed explicit break-glass burden and blocked export messaging checks.
references.rejected: The existing ops design system remains authoritative for component styling.

references.borrowed: Details guidance informed keeping diagnostic detail visible while richer actions are blocked.
references.rejected: No collapsible details component was added.

references.borrowed: Summary-list guidance informed key/value hash and export-manifest evidence checks.
references.rejected: Existing local definition-list and table components were retained.
